title: Distance of nearest cell having one

content.problemStatement: Given a binary grid of N*M. Find the distance of the nearest 1 in the grid for each cell.
content.outputFormat: A 2D grid of integers representing the distance of the nearest 1 in the grid for each cell

hidden.label: tricky case / empty-like / negative if allowed

solution.approach: Use BFS to traverse the grid and calculate the distance of the nearest 1 for each cell
